{{Quote|Why she would have returned to the general vicinity of her first attack on us I am not sure, but she can not be up to any good. I have assigned Agent Shofeld to continue observation until she leaves the planet.|Lieutenant Commander Zhir-Khan reporting on Zayl Braith|<ref name="AIR" />}}
[[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] '''Zhir-Khan''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] officer. Zhir-Khan was a member of the [[Task Force on Alliance Security]], and wrote a report on the threat posed by [[Zayl Braith]] to the Rebel Alliance.<ref name="AIR" />

Zhir-Khan found fugitive Zayl Braith during a routine stay on [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]]. Braith should not have been on Ord Mantell, as she had recently made an attack there. Curious about her presence, Zhir-Khan assigned [[Agent/Legends|Agent]] [[Shofeld]] to keep an eye on her. The [[Spy/Legends|spy]] [[Derrida/Legends|Derrida]] tried to frame Zhir-Khan, falsifying records to implicate the officer in [[Treason/Legends|treason]] against the Alliance. This scheme failed, and Zhir-Khan's loyalty to the Alliance was not doubted.<ref name="AIR" />
